title: BEM-853.1 source freeze
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols/frozen','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:11 (UTC+3)'
src=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_PROTOCOL_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
dst=Path('governance/protocols/frozen/BEM850_AGREED_PROTOCOL_FROM_CLAUDE_FROZEN.md')
txt=src.read_text(errors='ignore') if src.exists() else ''
dst.write_text('# FROZEN SOURCE | BEM850 AGREED PROTOCOL'+sep+sep+'Frozen at: '+created+sep+'Source: '+str(src)+sep+sep+txt)
state={'bem':'BEM-853.1','status':'protocol_source_frozen','source':str(src),'frozen':str(dst),'next_action':'enforce proof triad gate','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem853_1_protocol_source_freeze.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem853_1_protocol_source_freeze.md').write_text('# BEM-853.1 | Protocol Source Freeze | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem853_1_next.md').write_text('Next: BEM-853.2 enforce proof triad gate. Operator relay forbidden. Reports do not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-853.1'+sep+sep+'Status: protocol_source_frozen'+sep+'Next: BEM-853.2 proof triad gate'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(dst),'governance/state/bem853_1_protocol_source_freeze.json','governance/reports/bem853_1_protocol_source_freeze.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem853_1_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Froze BEM850 agreed Claude protocol as implementation source of truth')
"""
